Data.Name: AEBS_Config
Data.Comment: "Flag to determine the aebs function. This data has a specific DID, due to plant constraints => All

Data.Name: Alignment_State
Data.Comment: Alignment state of the radar at each trip start

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Data.Name: Param_veh_2.Steer_gear_ratio
Data.Comment: Gear between angle of steering wheel and steering angle

Data.Name: Param_veh_2.RPLB
Data.Comment: "1 = Mounted with connector down (towards ground) -1 = Mounted with connector up (towards sky)"

Data.Name: Safety_monitoring.P_sys_x_FourWVehicleSpeedClockCheckEnable
Data.Comment: Parameter allowing to enable clock check.

Data.Name: Safety_monitoring.P_sys_x_FourWVehicleSpeedChecksumCheckEnable
Data.Comment: Parameter allowing to enable checksum check.

Data.Name: Safety_monitoring.P_sys_x_SwaClockCheckEnable
Data.Comment: Parameter allowing to enable clock check.

Data.Name: Safety_monitoring.P_sys_x_SwaChecksumCheckEnable
Data.Comment: Parameter allowing to enable checksum check.

Data.Name: Safety_monitoring.P_sys_x_BrakeControlR1ClockCheckEnable
Data.Comment: Parameter allowing to enable clock check.

Data.Name: Safety_monitoring.P_sys_x_BrakeControlR1ChecksumCheckEnable
Data.Comment: Parameter allowing to enable checksum check.

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adj. failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or sys. operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerECUHardwareNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used by reading services to reference the vehicle-manufacturer-specific ECU (server) hardware number.

Record data content and format shall be serverspecific and defined by vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) software number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareVersionNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) software version number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: systemSupplierIdentifier
Data.Comment: Name and address information of the supplier.
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier name and address information.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: ECUSerialNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the ECU (server) serial number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific.

Data.Name: VIN
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the VIN number.

Record data content and format shall be specified by the vehicle manufacturer.

It shall not be erased when the ECU is reprogrammed.

Data.Name: VehicleSpeed_84 _copy_ value at AEB start T1 + 600ms
diagnosticVersion
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the diagnostic version of the ECU.

It is defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Refer to manufacture ECU designer.

Data.Name: Plant Alignment checking.Horizontal Alignment value on EEPROM
Data.Comment: Right is Positive, Left is NEGATIVE This is the current offset after RunTime

Item.Text: Target setting offset in horizontal direction
Mirror kept in the same Position

Data.Name: Plant Alignment checking.State of radar in alignment

Item.Text: Alignment conditions not ready, vehicle moving or vehicle speed not equal to 0km/h
Alignment conditions not ready, system Failure detected
Alignment conditions not ready, systen failure detected and vehicle moving or speed not equal to 0

Data.Name: Plant Alignment checking.Vertical Alignment value on EEPROM
Data.Comment: up is positive, down is negative This is the current offset after Run Time

Data.Name: CW_track.CW_angle
Data.Comment: "angle to track (not curve corrected) (positive = track on the right)"

Data.Name: CW_track.CW_lat_speed
Data.Comment: lateral speed of track (positive = track moving to the right)

Data.Name: CW_track.CW_stationary_object
Data.Comment: "stationary object means not moving, and has never been seen moving in the past. 0 = no stationary o

Data.Name: CW_track.CW_new_track
Data.Comment: "f a new object is recognized this bit is set for two cycles 0 = no new track 1 = new track"

Data.Name: Diag_AddOn_driver_Event_1.Driver brakes status (BrakeIndication and Brake pressure criteria) at AEB start
Diag_AddOn_driver_Event_1.Driver brakes status (BrakeIndication and Brake pressure criteria) during AEB
Diag_AddOn_driver_Event_1.Driver brakes status (BrakeIndication and Brake pressure criteria) at AEB end
Diag_AddOn_driver_Event_1.Gas pedal position at AEB start
Diag_AddOn_driver_Event_1.Gas pedal position Min during whole event.
Diag_AddOn_driver_Event_1.Gas pedal position Max during whole event.
Architecture_Type
Data.Comment: Alignment state of the radar at each trip start

Data.Name: Configuration_finished.RenaultConfigFinished
Data.Comment: Define if the radar is configured or not. By default, this value is equal to 0.This DID is the last

Data.Name: Diag_AddOn_driver_Event_2.Driver brakes status (BrakeIndication and Brake pressure criteria) at AEB end
Diag_AddOn_driver_Event_2.Driver brakes status (BrakeIndication and Brake pressure criteria) at AEB start
Diag_AddOn_driver_Event_2.Driver brakes status (BrakeIndication and Brake pressure criteria) during AEB
Diag_AddOn_driver_Event_2.Gas pedal position at AEB start
Diag_AddOn_driver_Event_2.Gas pedal position Max during whole event.
Diag_AddOn_driver_Event_2.Gas pedal position Min during whole event.
Diag_AddOn_driver_Event_3.Driver brakes status (BrakeIndication and Brake pressure criteria) at AEB end
Diag_AddOn_driver_Event_3.Driver brakes status (BrakeIndication and Brake pressure criteria) at AEB start
Diag_AddOn_driver_Event_3.Driver brakes status (BrakeIndication and Brake pressure criteria) during AEB
Diag_AddOn_driver_Event_3.Gas pedal position at AEB start
Diag_AddOn_driver_Event_3.Gas pedal position Max during whole event.
Diag_AddOn_driver_Event_3.Gas pedal position Min during whole event.
Diag_AddOn_flag_Event_2.Flag Recording terminated (0 at writing start, 1 once terminated).
Diag_AddOn_flag_Event_3.Flag Recording terminated (0 at writing start, 1 once terminated).
Diag_AddOn_flag_Event_4.Flag Recording terminated (0 at writing start, 1 once terminated).
Param_Sensor.ElevationMountingPosRadarSensor
Data.Comment: Elevation mounting position of radar sensor (distance to road plane)

Data.Name: Param_Sensor.LongiMountingPosRadarSensor
Data.Comment: Longitudinal mounting position of radar sensor (distance to rear axis)

Data.Name: Param_veh_1.Vehicle Heigth
Data.Comment: Minimum height be passable by the vehicle. Example: 1.5m means that only underpassings of less than

Data.Name: Param_veh_1.Wheel Base
Data.Comment: Longitudinal distance between the center of tire contact of pair of wheels on same vehicle side (Whe

Data.Name: Param_veh_1.Longitudinal_Displacement
Data.Comment: Longitudinal displacment related to vehicle center of gravity

Data.Name: Param_veh_1.AxisLoadDistr
Data.Comment: The ratio of the vertical load at rear axle to total vehicle vertical load

Data.Name: Param_veh_1.Center_of_gravity_hgt
Data.Comment: Center of gravity height (Imaginary point where the total weight of the body may be thought to be co

Data.Name: Param_veh_1.Sterring Ratio
Data.Comment: The ratio between steering wheel angle and the steer angle.

Data.Name: Param_veh_1.Lateral_displacement
Data.Comment: Lateral displacement related to vehicle reference point

Data.Name: Param_veh_1.WhlTcksPerRev
Data.Comment: Number of sensor pulses per wheel revolution

Data.Name: Param_veh_1.Overhang
Data.Comment: Longitudinal distance from the center of front axle group to the front most point

Data.Name: Param_veh_1.PitchAngle
Data.Comment: Angular displacement about sensor lateral axis (+ down)

Data.Name: Param_veh_1.RollAngle
Data.Comment: Angular displacement about sensor longitudinal axis

Data.Name: Param_veh_1.YawAngle
Data.Comment: Angular displacemnt about vehicle vertical axis

Data.Name: Param_veh_1.CoverDamping
Data.Comment: Attenuation of secondary surface (two-way) in dB

Plant Alignment checking.Copy Horizontal Alignment value on EEPROM
Data.Comment: Right is Positive, Left is NEGATIVE This is the current offset after RunTime

Data.Name: Plant Alignment checking.Copy Vertical Alignment value on EEPROM
Data.Comment: up is positive, down is negative This is the current offset after Run Time

Data.Name: SessionName
Data.Comment: Diagnostic session values. See documentation for more information.
Data.Description:
[0x00] : ISO / SAE Reserved
[0x01] : Default session
[0x02] : Programming session
[0x03] : Extended diagnostic session
[0x04] : Safety system diagnostic session
[0x05 - 0x3F] : ISO / SAE Reserved
[0x40 - 0x5F] : Vehicle manufacturer specific
[0x60 - 0x7E] : System supplier specific
[0x7F] : ISO / SAE Reserved

Diag_AddOn_AEB_Event_1.Max brake torque request during AEB
Diag_AddOn_AEB_Event_1.Min brake torque request during AEB
Diag_AddOn_AEB_Event_4.Min brake torque request during AEB
RoutineIdentifierList
Data.Comment: Routine identifier - This is an example. See documentation for more information.
Data.Description:
Definition of RoutineControl

Data: RoutineIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all routine identifier that may be used with InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
  
    0x4501 - ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave

If some of these routine identifer have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the routine identifer followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Min
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Max
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Freq

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the RoutineControl request, after the RoutineIdentifierList data.

Data.Name: RoutineControlType
Data.Comment: Routine control type - VALUES OTHER THAN 1, 2 & 3 ARE RESERVED AND SHOULD NOT BE USED.

Data.Name: Diag_AddOn_AEB_Event_2.Min brake torque request during AEB
Diag_AddOn_AEB_Event_2.Max brake torque request during AEB

Diag_AddOn_AEB_Event_3.Min brake torque request during AEB
Diag_AddOn_AEB_Event_4.Max brake torque request during AEB
Diag_AddOn_flag_Event_1.Flag Recording terminated (0 at writing start, 1 once terminated).

Item.Text: Alignment condition not ready (Vehcile is moving)
Alignment condition not ready (System failure detected)
Alignment condition not ready (System failure detected and Vehicle moving)

Data.Name: Alignment_in_plant.ElevationAngle value
Data.Comment: Delevation value for alignment in plant.

Data.Name: Alignment_in_plant.AzimutAngle value
Data.Comment: Dfil value for alignment in plant.

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Default
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Programming
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.ExtendedDiagnostic
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: RoutineControl
Request.Comment: You should remove ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.xxx data. These are examples.
